critical_issues.description: Handlers classified as 'operator' have user-facing triggers, violating S:W:H:E architecture
critical_issues.resolution: Reclassify these handlers as 'trigger' role and move to triggers/ directories

recommendations: Add architectural validation rules to prevent operator/trigger misclassification
Create clearer guidelines for role assignment in handler creation
Document S:W:H:E architecture principles more clearly
Consider domain boundary guidelines for ambiguous handlers
